fields.title: How to Get More Views on TikTok
fields.metaTitle: How to Get More Views on TikTok | Learn | InstantViral
fields.metaDescription: Views rise when early viewers watch longer and rewatch. Improve the first three seconds, pacing, and on-screen clarity before changing niche or buying attention
faqs: Do longer videos get fewer views?
Should every video use trending audio?

fields.newsletterCopy: Views rise when early viewers watch longer and rewatch. Improve the first three seconds, pacing, and on-screen clarity before changing niche or buying attention.
